description: Configure the File Upload settings to enforce a strict policy. Set the Maximum File Upload Size to 5,242,880 bytes (5 MB) and the Accepted Media Types to 'image/jpeg,image/png,image/gif,application/pdf,text/plain'. Enable 'Protect Uploaded Files' to ensure only authenticated users can access them. Announce the new policy in the #general channel, specifically mentioning the 5 MB limit and the allowed file types (Images, PDFs, and Text). Login credentials: username 'admin', password 'Admin1234!'.
